_about: Controlled vocabulary for the CAO Audit Navigator index. Every topic/risk tag assigned to an observation in index.json must exist here. Tags are curated normalizations of the reports' own wording; the supporting verbatim quote lives in the same index record (see CLAUDE.md, Data model). Extend only when a report does not fit an existing entry.

topics.label: Governance & accountability
topics.definition: Office structures, statutory committees, accountability frameworks, oversight mechanisms and delegation of authority.

topics.label: Risk management
topics.definition: Risk registers, annual risk assessments, enterprise risk management processes and risk escalation.

topics.label: Fraud risk management
topics.definition: Fraud risk assessment, anti-fraud strategy, fraud awareness training and fraud reporting.

topics.label: PSEA / safeguarding
topics.definition: Protection from sexual exploitation and abuse: risk assessments, partner capacity, monitoring, reporting channels and training.

topics.label: Accountability to Affected Populations
topics.definition: AAP strategy, community feedback mechanisms and participation of affected children and families.

topics.label: Implementing partnership management
topics.definition: Partner selection (open vs direct), due diligence, programme documents, partner reporting and oversight.

topics.label: Cash transfers to implementing partners
topics.definition: Direct cash transfers, FACE form processing, liquidations and grant-period compliance for partner funding.

topics.label: Cash assistance to beneficiaries
topics.definition: Humanitarian/social cash transfers to individuals: beneficiary targeting, payment verification and grievance redressal.

topics.label: HACT / financial assurance
topics.definition: Harmonized Approach to Cash Transfers assurance: micro-assessments, spot checks, partner audits, programmatic visits and follow-up of financial findings.

topics.label: Programme planning & work planning
topics.definition: Workplans, results frameworks, indicators, country programme priorities and planning processes.

topics.label: Programme / field monitoring
topics.definition: Programmatic visits, field monitoring plans, eTools/FMM usage, action-point tracking and results monitoring.

topics.label: Results recording & reporting
topics.definition: Quality and accuracy of reported results, situation reports and performance data.

topics.label: Supply & logistics management
topics.definition: Supply planning, warehousing, inventory, distribution and logistics capacity of partners.

topics.label: Supply end-user monitoring (SEUM)
topics.definition: Verification that supplies reach intended beneficiaries in the planned quality and quantity.

topics.label: Procurement
topics.definition: Procurement planning, tendering, bid evaluation, Contract Review Committee and contract award processes.

topics.label: Service contracts
topics.definition: Institutional service contracts, third-party contractors/extenders, contract management and closure.

topics.label: Vendor management
topics.definition: Vendor registration, evaluation, sanctioning, performance management and due diligence.

topics.label: Construction
topics.definition: Direct and indirect construction projects: planning, contracting, supervision, indemnification and sustainability.

topics.label: Financial management
topics.definition: Payment processing, expense classification, financial analysis, grants management and accounting controls.

topics.label: Resource mobilization & fundraising
topics.definition: Resource mobilization strategy, donor reporting, private sector fundraising and funding pipeline.

topics.label: Human resources & staffing
topics.definition: Recruitment, vacancies, staffing structure, consultants, training compliance and staff wellbeing.

topics.label: Travel management
topics.definition: Duty and entitlement travel, travel planning, authorization, costs and travel vendor management.

topics.label: Asset management
topics.definition: Custody, counting, loan and write-off of UNICEF-owned assets.

topics.label: ICT & data systems
topics.definition: Information systems, dashboards, data integrity, cloud vendors and technology roll-out.

topics.label: Safety & security
topics.definition: Security risk management, programme criticality and staff safety measures.

topics.label: Emergency preparedness & response
topics.definition: Humanitarian response operations, emergency procedures, preparedness planning and business continuity.

topics.label: Knowledge management
topics.definition: Capturing, sharing and reusing lessons learned and institutional knowledge.

risks.label: Fraud, waste & abuse
risks.definition: Exposure to fraud, corruption, collusion, misappropriation or abuse of funds, assets and resources.

risks.label: Misuse of transferred funds
risks.definition: Funds transferred to partners or providers not used for intended purposes, or use cannot be verified.

risks.label: Financial loss / exposure
risks.definition: Unrecovered ineligible expenditure, unindemnified liabilities or accounting errors leading to loss.

risks.label: Value for money
risks.definition: Inefficiency, higher costs, cost overruns or benefits of competition and oversight not realized.

risks.label: Programme delivery
risks.definition: Delays, inefficiencies or failures in implementing planned programme activities and achieving results.

risks.label: Reliability of results & data
risks.definition: Reported results, indicators or financial data are incomplete, inconsistent or unverifiable.

risks.label: Supply diversion / loss
risks.definition: Supplies lost, expired, stolen or not reaching intended beneficiaries.

risks.label: Supply quality
risks.definition: Substandard or compromised quality of supplies or constructed outputs.

risks.label: SEA occurrence
risks.definition: Sexual exploitation and abuse occurring due to ineffective safeguards or capacity gaps.

risks.label: Under-reporting (SEA/fraud)
risks.definition: Incidents not reported due to inadequate channels, awareness or trust.

risks.label: Community participation
risks.definition: Affected populations unable to participate in or give feedback on decisions affecting them.

risks.label: Grievance mechanisms
risks.definition: Complaint/redressal mechanisms missing, unknown to beneficiaries or not functioning.

risks.label: Beneficiary targeting & payment
risks.definition: Wrong or unverified beneficiaries; payments not received in full or on time.

risks.label: Partner capacity
risks.definition: Implementing partners or third parties lack capacity to deliver or safeguard resources.

risks.label: Transparency of selection/award
risks.definition: Partner or vendor selection insufficiently documented, competitive or justified.

risks.label: Conflict of interest
risks.definition: Undeclared or unmanaged conflicts of interest in procurement, evaluation or decision-making.

risks.label: Vendor integrity
risks.definition: Engagement of vendors that are not financially or ethically sound.

risks.label: Fragmented oversight / weak controls
risks.definition: Gaps, overlaps or blind spots in oversight structures, monitoring and internal control design.

risks.label: Accountability clarity
risks.definition: Roles, responsibilities and authorities unclear, misaligned or undocumented.

risks.label: Unaddressed residual risk
risks.definition: Key risks not identified, assessed, mitigated, monitored or escalated.

risks.label: Policy / regulatory compliance
risks.definition: Non-adherence to UNICEF policies, procedures, legal frameworks or mandatory requirements.

risks.label: Donor compliance
risks.definition: Activities or expenditure outside grant conditions or validity periods; donor confidence at risk.

risks.label: Funding sustainability
risks.definition: Funding gaps, donor concentration or unsustainable financing threatening continuity of the programme or office.

risks.label: Reputational
risks.definition: Potential damage to UNICEF's reputation and stakeholder trust.

risks.label: Staff safety & security
risks.definition: Staff exposed to harm due to inadequately mitigated security risks.

risks.label: Staff capacity & morale
risks.definition: Vacancies, workload, welfare or morale issues affecting the workforce.

risks.label: ICT & data risks
risks.definition: Data protection, cybersecurity, vendor data retention or unreliable systems.
